name: mediatwist-automation-engine
description: AI-powered daily content engine: generate → render → upload → publish (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn)

scripts.render:feed: npx remotion render src/index.ts FeedPost outputs/feed-post.mp4 --codec h264
scripts.render:reels: npx remotion render src/index.ts ReelsPost outputs/reels-post.mp4 --codec h264
scripts.render:caption: npx remotion render src/index.ts BrandedCaption outputs/caption-post.mp4 --codec h264
scripts.render:dashboard: npx remotion render src/index.ts DataDashboard outputs/dashboard-post.mp4 --codec h264
scripts.render:kinetic: npx remotion render src/index.ts KineticType outputs/kinetic-post.mp4 --codec h264
